name: Hawaiian Tuna
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the pineapple and reserve the liquid.
2. Fry the pineapple in butter for 5 minutes.
3. Add enough water to the reserved pineapple liquid to make 1 cup.
4. Blend the cornstarch into the liquid and add the chicken noodle soup. Stir gently until dissolved.
5. Pour the soup and pineapple liquids into a skillet.
6. Add the tuna and simmer over low heat for about 5 minutes, stirring occasionally to prevent sticking.
7. Before serving, blend in the soy sauce.
